summary: Frontend-only testing of dark mode redesign (navy/blue theme) and performance optimizations (lazy loading, debounced search, API caching, code splitting). All 8 requested features verified via Playwright automation. All PASS.

issues: YouTube background iframe shows 'Video unavailable' overlay in preview env, overlapping with the stat numbers. Not a dark-mode regression, but the fallback UX could be improved (e.g., use a static image if iframe fails). Video URL: youtube.com/embed/JnempufjTdw

passed_tests: Homepage lazy loads (React.lazy Suspense) without errors - main-heading rendered
API returns 50 ranges - 50 range cards rendered on Homepage (fetchRanges with limit=50)
Dark mode body background = rgb(15, 23, 41) = hsl(222, 47%, 11%) - navy blue confirmed
Dark mode range card background = rgb(30, 41, 59) = slate-800 as expected
Dark mode filter panel background = rgb(30, 41, 59) = slate-800 as expected
Light mode body background = rgb(255, 255, 255) (light theme applied)
Search debounce: typing 'Fair' rapidly produced 0 immediate API calls, only 1 API call after 400ms debounce (useDebounce hook working)
Range detail page (/range/:id) preserves dark theme - dark class + navy bg persist across route
API caching implemented in /app/frontend/src/services/api.js with 5-minute TTL (code review)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Consider adding a static poster/fallback image behind the YouTube iframe so the 'Video unavailable' text does not clash with the stats section in environments where the iframe is blocked.
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext initializes isDark=false and only reads localStorage inside useEffect. This can cause a one-frame FOUC (light-mode flash) for users who prefer dark. Consider initializing state via lazy initializer that reads localStorage synchronously to avoid the flash.
HomePage.js is ~690 lines and could be split (FilterPanel and RangeCard into their own files) for maintainability (>700 line guideline).

useEffect in HomePage.js depends only on debouncedSearchQuery but reads userLocation and filters from closure - could cause stale-closure searches. Exhaustive-deps eslint rule should be enabled and dependencies added.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode uses .dark class on <html> via ThemeContext. CSS variables define navy palette in index.css lines 54-80: --background 222 47% 11% (rgb 15,23,41), cards 222 47% 14% (rgb 30,41,59). Range cards use dark:bg-slate-800, filter panel uses dark:bg-slate-800. Debounce is 400ms (useDebounce hook). API caching TTL 5 min in services/api.js. Route lazy loading via React.lazy in App.js. All data-testids verified working: theme-toggle, search-input, range-card-{id}, view-details-link-{id}, main-heading.
